Notice Of Motion And Motion For Contractual Award Of Plaintiffs Attorneys Fees And Costs; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jun-21-2024 Continued To Jul-19-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher LeClerk, Esq., Tel. 415.445.0900, appearing in person for plaintiff Brian Gagliardi;
Jannine Kranz, Esq., Tel. 661.313.7419, appearing via Zoom for defendants Block, Inc. and Square, Inc.

Hearing re: PLAINTIFF BRIAN GAGLIARDI'S Motion For Contractual Award Of Plaintiffs Attorneys Fees And Costs.

The matter is contested. Argument is held.

At the conclusion of argument, the Court continued the matter to July 19, 2024, at 9:30 a.m. on the Law & Motion calendar.

The Court notes that it will review the cases cited during today's argument and will issue an interim order. The Court requests that each side prepare a proposed order noting that it would like to see where we are on fees. The Court requested that counsel submit fee requests and any motion to tax. The parties are to return to court on July 19, 2024.

Judge: Rochelle C. East. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Barbara James, CSR #7009, Email: blscsr@aol.ocom, Tel. 310.502.1616. Bailiff: Loo. (301/RCE)
